title: Now Hiring Store Manager at Reliance Footprint

jsonLd.title: Now Hiring Store Manager at Reliance Footprint
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Reliance Footprint! We are hiring a Store Manager for our Amritsar team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Reliance Footprint:
Reliance Footprint is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Life and accident insurance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Amritsar, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Reliance Footprint!
